nav.searchPlaceholder: What would you like to order?

hero.promoBadge: {value}% off your first order with promo {code}
hero.titleLine3: Hot and fast - at your door.
hero.subtitle: Order your favorite food with fast delivery across Kotayk and Yerevan. Fresh rolls, hot pizza, and juicy shawarma.
hero.seoLine: Hot sushi, pizza and shawarma with fast delivery in Yerevan and Nor Hachn. Free delivery in Nor Hachn.

home.promo_hot_title: From the oven to your door

welcomePromo.title: 🎁 10% off your first order!
welcomePromo.description: We are giving you a discount on your first order. Click the button below to apply the promo code to your cart.

home.seo_text_title: Sushi & Pizza Delivery in Nor Hachn and Yerevan
home.seo_text_body: East West Delivery is your fast food delivery service. Order fresh sushi, rolls, hot pizza, shawarma and lahmajo with delivery in 45-60 minutes. We cook from quality ingredients and deliver your order hot. Place an order online in just a few clicks!

banners.title: Banners
banners.subtitle: Banners appear in the promo carousel on the home page. The “Link” field is where the customer goes when they click the banner (not where it is shown).
banners.draftCreated: Banner created as hidden. Set the caption and dates, then enable display.
banners.emptyHint: Upload a photo - the banner is created hidden. Configure it and turn display on.
banners.captionDialogHint: Shown over the photo with a dark overlay. If a link is set, a button appears. Empty - just the photo.
banners.deleteHint: The banner will disappear from the home page.
banners.linkHelp: Internal path: /menu or /menu?category=sets. Empty - banner has no link.
banners.errFormat: Start with “/” (e.g. /menu) or enter a full https:// URL.
banners.errForbidden: The /admin and /api sections cannot be used.

aiTranslate.sectionSubtitle: Write in Russian, then auto-fill Armenian and English with one click.
aiTranslate.step1: Fill in Russian on each field below

aiTranslate.noTextHint: Add Russian text first — at least in the Name field
aiTranslate.sourceFieldHint: Source language — AI translates from this text
aiTranslate.targetFieldHint: Auto-filled after translation; you can edit manually
aiTranslate.noText: No Russian text filled in to translate.
aiTranslate.success: Armenian and English fields updated. Review before saving.
aiTranslate.errorTimeout: Translation timed out. Please try again.
aiTranslate.errorConfig: Translation service is not configured on the server.
aiTranslate.errorUpstream: Translation service returned an error. Please try again.
aiTranslate.reviewAfterTranslate: Switched to Armenian — check HY and EN tabs, then save.
